title: BEM-866 isolate Claude selftest workflow
objective:
Run script:
"""
# Remove the risky BEM-865 selftest patch from claude.yml if present.
claude = Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml')
text = claude.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
lines = text.splitlines()
out = []
i = 0
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i]
    if '- name: BEM-865 Claude mailbox write selftest' in line:
        indent = len(line) - len(line.lstrip(' '))
        i += 1
        while i < len(lines):
            nxt = lines[i]
            nindent = len(nxt) - len(nxt.lstrip(' '))
            if nxt.lstrip().startswith('- name:') and nindent == indent:
                break
            i += 1
        continue
    out.append(line)
    i += 1
claude.write_text('\n'.join(out).rstrip() + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

# Dedicated workflow with minimal workflow_dispatch and explicit mailbox write.
wf = Path('.github/workflows/claude_write_selftest.yml')
wf.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
wf.write_text('''name: claude_write_selftest

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      trace_id:
        description: "Trace id"
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  write_mailbox:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}

      - name: Write Claude selftest mailbox
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude
          cat > governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md <<'EOF'
# BEM-865 CLAUDE WRITE SELFTEST RESPONSE
Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK
Writer: claude_write_selftest.yml
Trace: bem865_claude_write_selftest
EOF

      - name: Commit mailbox write
        run: |
          git config user.name "claude-internal-auditor"
          git config user.email "actions@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md
          if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
            git commit -m "BEM-865 Claude write selftest mailbox"
            git pull --rebase --autostash origin main
            git push origin HEAD:main
          fi
''', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_SELFTEST_WORKFLOW_ISOLATED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude selftest workflow isolated\nStatus: PATCHED\nWorkflow: .github/workflows/claude_write_selftest.yml\nRestored: .github/workflows/claude.yml risky selftest step removed\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(claude))
changed_files.append(str(wf))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('isolated Claude mailbox write selftest workflow and cleaned claude.yml')
"""
No issue comments.
